description: Same birthday party with slightly different wording - should match

content_parts.text:
You are comparing calendar events to detect duplicates.

**New Event:**
- Title: Emily's 7th Birthday Party
- Start: 2026-03-15T14:00:00
- End: 2026-03-15T17:00:00
- Location: Adventure Zone, 123 Main St
- Description: Come celebrate Emily turning 7! Pizza, cake, and fun activities. Please RSVP by March 10th.

**Existing Events (same date):**

1. Event ID: event-001
   - Title: Emily's Birthday Celebration
   - Start: 2026-03-15T14:00:00
   - End: 2026-03-15T17:00:00
   - Location: Adventure Zone
   - Description: Join us for Emily's 7th birthday! Pizza, cake, games.

2. Event ID: event-002
   - Title: Team Standup
   - Start: 2026-03-15T09:00:00
   - End: 2026-03-15T09:30:00
   - Location: Office
   - Description: Daily standup meeting

3. Event ID: event-003
   - Title: Dentist Appointment
   - Start: 2026-03-14T10:00:00
   - End: 2026-03-14T11:00:00
   - Location: Bright Smiles Dental
   - Description: Regular checkup

**Question:** Is the new event the same as any of the existing events?

Consider events the same if they refer to the same real-world event, even if:
- Wording is slightly different
- One has more details than the other
- Time changed slightly (updates)

Return the matching Event ID (or null if no match) and brief reasoning.
